overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sandy beach path beside an abandoned brutalist mall. The scene transitions from open coastal views with a distant neon-lit city skyline to the building's entrance, where the character ascends a grand concrete staircase into the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach path with ocean views and distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach path with the ocean to the left and city skyline ahead

entered.detail: calm body of water stretching to the horizon with distant industrial structures
futuristic high-rise buildings with neon signage and glass facades
large amusement park roller coaster silhouette against the sky
tall building with distinctive green and red neon paneling
small weathered wooden structure on the sand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with the camera moving along a sandy path. Palm trees line the route while the ocean bay stretches out to the left. In the distance, a futuristic city skyline rises with a distinctive colorful tower and roller coaster visible against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned coastal mall exterior with beach access

events.description: passing by a red abandoned car wreck partially buried in the sand

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned mall building, navigating around beach debris and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a bright purple and teal jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete building with multiple levels and broken windows
elevated concrete pedestrian bridge connecting building sections
large rectangular advertisement screen mounted on the building
rusted red sedan wreck with missing doors sitting on the sand

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the abandoned mall's exterior, passing under an overhead walkway and by a large orange billboard. The path is moderately populated with pedestrians, including one in a distinctive colorful jacket. A red abandoned car wreck sits prominently on the sand as the ocean disappears from view behind the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: brutalist building entrance with grand staircase

events.description: entering the covered stairwell, lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadowy interior
beginning ascent of the wide concrete staircase into the building

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs into the building interior, following the central staircase upward

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete staircase with metal railings leading up into the building
metal handrails along both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters the abandoned mall through a grand concrete entrance. As the character ascends the wide staircase, the environment transitions from bright sunlight to a shadowy interior illuminated by overhead fixtures. Other pedestrians are seen descending the stairs as the camera moves upward toward the light visible at the top of the stairwell.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open coastline into the shadowy depths of a brutalist architectural structure. It begins on a sunny beach, gliding along a sandy path lined with palm trees while a futuristic city skyline with a colorful tower looms in the distance. As the camera moves inland, the ocean disappears behind the massive exterior of an abandoned mall, passing under an overhead walkway and by a large orange billboard and a red car wreck. The scene then shifts toward the building's grand concrete entrance, where the character begins to ascend a wide staircase. Finally, the environment transitions from the brilliant outdoor sunlight to a dim, shadowy interior illuminated by overhead fixtures as the camera climbs toward the light at the top of the stairwell.
